message:
ci(release): replace retired macos-13 runner with macos-15

The macOS-13 runner images are now retired by GitHub Actions.
Updated the verify-upgrade job to use macos-15 for Intel x64 testing.

See: https://github.com/actions/runner-images/issues/13046

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -174,7 +174,7 @@ jobs:
           - os: macos-latest
             goos: darwin
             goarch: arm64
-          - os: macos-13
+          - os: macos-15
             goos: darwin
             goarch: amd64
           - os: windows-latest
